compiled_state.title: GREEN: Add scrutiny opt-in to roadmap and write caveat tag on opt-out
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Update plugins/dso/skills/roadmap/SKILL.md to add scrutiny opt-in flow:

### Opt-in question (add after Phase 2, before Phase 3)
- Add a one-time question: 'Would you like to apply full scrutiny (gap analysis, web research, scenario analysis, fidelity review) to each epic? This produces higher-quality specs but takes longer. [y/n]'
- Store the answer as a session variable — do NOT re-ask for each epic

### Opt-in path (answer: yes)
- After each epic is finalized in Phase 5 (before ticket creation), invoke the shared scrutiny pipeline from plugins/dso/skills/shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md
- Run scrutiny per-epic inline (not batched) to avoid timeout issues on large roadmaps
- Append scrutiny output (gap analysis, scenario analysis, fidelity review verdict) to the epic spec before ticket creation

### Opt-out path (answer: no)
- After each epic ticket is created in Phase 5, write the scrutiny:pending tag via ticket edit:
  `.claude/scripts/dso ticket edit <epic-id> tags 'scrutiny:pending'`
- This marks the epic for downstream skills to gate on

### Remove .test-index RED marker

SAFEGUARD FILE: plugins/dso/skills/roadmap/SKILL.md is protected per CLAUDE.md rule 18.

## File Impact
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/roadmap/SKILL.md
- MODIFY: .test-index

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/*.py $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/**/*.py
- [ ] `ruff format --check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/*.py $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Roadmap contains scrutiny opt-in question
  Verify: grep -qi 'apply full scrutiny' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/roadmap/SKILL.md
- [ ] Roadmap references shared pipeline
  Verify: grep -q 'shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/roadmap/SKILL.md
- [ ] Roadmap writes scrutiny:pending tag on opt-out
  Verify: grep -q 'scrutiny:pending' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/roadmap/SKILL.md
- [ ] .test-index RED marker removed
  Verify: { grep -q '\[test_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index; test $? -ne 0; }
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Gap Analysis Amendments

### Prerequisite enforcement (critical → addressed by story dependency)
Story 02b2-c73d depends on 4a74-872a (tag support). Sprint orchestrator blocks this story's tasks until 4a74-872a is closed. No runtime guard needed — tags will exist when this task executes.

### Insertion point specification (major)
The scrutiny opt-in question goes AFTER Phase 2 (Milestone Architecture) and BEFORE Phase 3 (Visual Prioritization). Insert as 'Phase 2.5: Scrutiny Decision'. The question is asked ONCE. If yes, scrutiny runs inline per-epic during Phase 5 (before ticket creation). If no, scrutiny:pending tag is written after each ticket creation in Phase 5.

### Tag round-trip (major → prerequisite responsibility)
Tag visibility in ticket show is 4a74-872a's done definition. This task writes the tag; 4a74-872a ensures it persists and displays.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: Roadmap scrutiny opt-in added with caveat tag
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
